entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum lines evaluated for their reaction to Ascochyta blight

entities.name: INTER-ROW SPACING
entities.description: The distance between rows of plants, which was tested for its effect on disease reaction

entities.name: ASCOCHYTA RABIEI
entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for Ascochyta blight in chickpeas

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO ASCOCHYTA BLIGHT
entities.description: The ability of chickpea lines to resist infection by A. rabiei

entities.name: ILC 2952
entities.description: A specific resistant line of chickpea that showed decreased resistance under closer spacing
